label: 139_amlcft_laundering_terrorism financing_money laundering
description: The annual AML/CFT Conference in Malaysia focuses on combating money laundering and terrorism financing. Speakers from the Malaysian government and central bank discuss national risk assessments and ongoing efforts to enforce global anti-money laundering standards.
